query: UPDATE places SET atollId = (SELECT id FROM atolls WHERE name LIKE '%gnavi%') WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%fuvah%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute UPDATE places SET atollId = (SELECT id FROM atolls WHERE name LIKE '%gnavi%') WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%fuvah%';
